title: Speaking - Part 3
description: Discuss the options with your partner for about two minutes, then decide together which two are the most important.

content.task: Discuss the influence of the following factors on the fashion industry today, then decide which two are the most important for achieving sustainability.

script.text: Now, I’d like you to talk about something together for about two minutes. Here are some aspects of the modern fashion industry.
Now decide which two factors would have the biggest impact on making fashion more environmentally friendly.
